title: mentha × piperita var. inarimensis
intro: Mentha × piperita var. inarimensis, also known as Japanese peppermint, is a natural hybrid of peppermint (Mentha piperita) that is native to Japan and Taiwan. It is a perennial herb that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Japanese peppermint include relieving digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and improving respiratory health. Japanese peppermint can be prepared as an herbal tea, oil, or infusion, and is also used in culinary and cosmetic applications.
